commands.review_summary:
The PR removes generic 600-second agent timeout examples, exports the shared timeout resolver, and changes gateway-backed `openclaw agent` dispatch to use the shared 48-hour default when no timeout is set.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +18, Docs +4. Total +23 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the mismatch: shared agent runtime defaults to 48 hours, while gateway CLI dispatch and generic docs examples still use 600 seconds when no timeout is set.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because the remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the compatibility-sensitive default fallback change, not a narrow code repair.

target.title: fix: align gateway agent timeout default
target.body:
Closes #98180

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users copying generic agent config examples could accidentally cap normal agent runs at 10 minutes even though OpenClaw's runtime default is 48 hours when `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` is omitted.

## Why This Change Was Made

The generic docs examples now omit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` and explicitly explain that omitted values use the `172800` second runtime default. The gateway-backed `openclaw agent` path now uses the same shared timeout resolver as embedded agent runs instead of carrying a separate `600` second fallback. Heartbeat-specific 600 second caps are left unchanged because they are intentionally bounded and already documented as heartbeat behavior.

## User Impact

Users and operators can copy the general agent examples without silently shortening whole-agent runtime to 10 minutes. Explicit `--timeout` and intentionally bounded heartbeat behavior are unchanged.

## Evidence

- `pnpm docs:list >/tmp/openclaw-timeout-docs-list.txt`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/gateway/config-agents.md docs/gateway/configuration-examples.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/gateway/config-agents.md docs/gateway/configuration-examples.md`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/timeout.ts src/commands/agent-via-gateway.ts src/commands/agent-via-gateway.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/agent-via-gateway.test.ts` (69 passed)

AI-assisted PR. I understand the change: it removes generic 600s agent-runtime examples and aligns the gateway CLI fallback with the existing 48h runtime resolver.
target.author: 100yenadmin
